dmView.readonlyTip: Read-only: you're viewing a party member's sheet
dmView.notAllowedBlurb: Only the campaign's Dungeon Master can open a party member's full sheet.
dmView.noCharacterBlurb: This player hasn't attached a character to the campaign yet.
dmView.sheetUnavailableBlurb: This character's sheet couldn't be loaded. It may have been deleted, or you no longer have access.
